summary: Iteration 33: Frontend testing of Restaurant POS with 3 payment options and Kitchen Display System (KDS). All features working correctly.

issues: Payment buttons (Cash, Bank, Credit) may require scrolling on 1080p screens to be fully visible - buttons positioned at y=1128 which is below typical viewport height

passed_tests: POS: Shows exactly 3 payment buttons - Cash, Bank, Credit (verified with data-testid)
POS: Branch name 'Main Branch' displayed in header under 'Restaurant POS'
POS: Credit payment opens 'Select Customer for Credit' dialog with customer list
POS: Customer selection dialog shows searchable customer list with names and phone numbers
POS: Order completion shows Print and Kitchen buttons in receipt dialog
POS: 'Send to Kitchen' updates order status to 'preparing' (verified with toast 'Order sent to kitchen!')
POS: Today Sales and Orders count displayed in header
POS: All 26 menu items displayed across 7 categories
POS: VAT (15%) calculation correct in cart footer
KDS: PIN login screen at /kds with 'Default PIN: 1234' hint
KDS: PIN 1234 successfully authenticates and loads Kitchen Display
KDS: Displays orders with 'preparing' status including order number, items, modifiers
KDS: Shows time elapsed (e.g., '23m ago', '5m ago', 'Just now')
KDS: URGENT badge appears for orders > 10 minutes old
KDS: Ready button marks order as 'ready' (verified with toast 'Order marked as ready!')
KDS: Order status changes from 'preparing' (Ready button) to 'ready' (Served button)
KDS: Auto-refresh indicator shows '5 seconds' in footer
KDS: Sound toggle and Refresh buttons available in header
KDS: Branch filter dropdown available for multi-branch filtering
critical_code_review_comments: All 10 features requested are working correctly
Payment buttons correctly limited to 3 options (Cash, Bank, Credit) per requirement
Credit payment properly requires customer selection before order can be completed
Send to Kitchen endpoint correctly updates order status to 'preparing'
KDS correctly fetches and displays orders with 'preparing' and 'ready' status
KDS auto-refreshes every 5 seconds via setInterval in useEffect hook
Minor console warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <select>' in KDS branch filter - cosmetic issue only
seed_data_creation: 26 menu items already seeded from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 33 complete. All POS and KDS features verified: (1) 3 payment buttons (Cash, Bank, Credit); (2) Branch fixed to cashier's branch shown in header; (3) Credit opens customer selection dialog; (4) Order completion shows Print + Kitchen buttons; (5) Send to Kitchen updates status to 'preparing'; (6) KDS PIN login with 1234; (7) KDS shows preparing orders; (8) KDS shows order#, items, modifiers, time elapsed; (9) KDS Ready button marks as 'ready'; (10) KDS auto-refreshes every 5 seconds. Note: Payment buttons may require scroll on smaller viewports.
